entities.girl: a girl looking at the remains
entities.puddle: a melted snowman (scarf, carrot, stones in a puddle)

scenes.title: The Melted Snowman
scenes.background_prompt: A front yard with a patchy lawn showing both snow and grass, a picket fence, a mailbox, and a driveway. Mild late-winter day. No people, no snowman.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A front yard on a mild late-winter day. The lawn is patchy — half melted snow, half emerging green grass. In the center of the yard, where a snowman once stood, only remnants remain: a wet puddle on flattened grass, a soggy red scarf lying in a coil, a carrot nose resting on its side in the mud, two coal-stone eyes sitting in the puddle, and three dark buttons in a line. The snowman has clearly melted over recent warm days. A girl of about seven in a purple winter coat and rubber boots stands beside the remains, looking down with a wistful, sad expression, her hands hanging at her sides. A white picket fence borders the yard. A mailbox with the flag up stands at the end of the driveway. A few patches of old dirty snow cling to the shaded side of the fence.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl standing beside a wet puddle on the lawn (center), looking down with wistful expression, hands at sides. Place puddle with remnants: a soggy red scarf in a coil, a carrot on its side, two coal-stone eyes, three dark buttons in a line.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, several long green blades of grass grow near a small green bush dotted with tiny white flowers. To the right, a puddle sits on a patch of green grass that is interspersed with white clover-like flowers and small patches of melting white snow. Inside the puddle are the remnants of a melted snowman, including a red and white striped scarf, a large orange carrot, a smaller carrot tip, and five small black circular buttons or stones. Standing just behind the puddle is a girl with a sad, downward-looking expression. She has brown hair styled in a single braid and wears an orange knit beanie with a pom-pom, a blue winter coat with a yellow zipper, a red and white striped scarf peeking out from the collar, a brown backpack with a small flower detail, green and white striped leggings, and blue boots with orange laces. To the right of the girl, a green metal mailbox with its red flag raised sits atop a textured brown wooden post. On the far right, a gray stone path composed of irregular rectangular blocks curves toward the background. Patches of white snow cover the ground around the path and the grass. In the middle ground, a white picket fence stretches across the width of the scene behind the girl and the mailbox. To the left of the fence stands a large, leafless brown tree with many reaching branches and a smaller, rounded green tree. To the right of the fence, there is another large rounded green tree, a tall, thin dark green evergreen, and a large, dense brown and green bush. The background features soft, rolling green and blue hills under a pale blue sky filled with several large, fluffy white clouds, suggesting a bright day during the transition from winter to spring.
